title: STARTDOCUMENT
text: STARTDOCUMENT Operation activated by the SAX parser when the start of an XML document is encountered. Explain this code operation STARTDOCUMENT Implement your code here end; STARTDOCUMENT operation Copy Description STARTDOCUMENT must have no parameters. This operation is the first one activated by PARSE and PARSEFILE . It can occur only once per XML document. Related Links PARSE Parses a specified XML stream. PARSEFILE Parses an XML document in the specified file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
